actions.value:
Hi,
unfortunately we had to pause the Mastercard feature and our provider is working on that.
We don't have yet an ETA for when it will be available again.

If you topped-up your card, we can have our provider to send you a refund, but we need the transaction ID of the top-up.

Please enter the wallet you used for the top-up, tap on the transaction, tap on view Advanced transaction data, copy the ID and paste it in the reply in plain text.


Now we will be able to look further into the transaction, thanks.
